# PHIL.124 ? Done is Better Than Perfect

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** execution_velocity
**Subcategory:** done_is_better_than_perfect
**Domain:** EXECUTION_VELOCITY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Shipping imperfect work beats endlessly polishing

## Application
Set 'good enough' thresholds, avoid perfectionism, release and iterate, value momentum
